mapper.select: SELECT fc.cabin_class, fc.price, fc.total_seats, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flight_seat fs WHERE fs.flight_id = fc.flight_id AND fs.cabin_class = fc.cabin_class AND fs.status = 'AVAILABLE') AS available_seats FROM flight_cabin fc WHERE fc.flight_id = #{flightId} ORDER BY FIELD(fc.cabin_class, 'FIRST', 'BUSINESS', 'ECONOMY')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO flight_cabin(flight_id, cabin_class, price, total_seats) VALUES
(#{c.flightId}, #{c.cabinClass}, #{c.price}, #{c.totalSeats})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = VALUES(price), total_seats = VALUES(total_seats)
